name: core-standards
description: Cross-stack engine and universal skills. Principles (detect→check→suggest, evidence required, separate plan/execute/verify phases, adversarial verifier mindset). Planning (structured plan block with measurable deliverables, craft.json auto-generation). Rules (§1 Security ALWAYS-MANDATORY, §2–§5 universal). Verification (4-tier detection: ALWAYS/PROJECT/TASK-SCOPED/FLAGGED, reads craft.json, restart-after-fix, adversarial framing). Auth-flows (JWT lifecycle, refresh rotation, PKCE, guard composition — active when craft.json features.auth set). Craft-config (craft.json schema and auto-generation).
